text: Natural Language Processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. It goes beyond simply reading words; it focuses on text understanding, allowing machines to grasp the meaning and context of sentences. One practical use is automatic translation, which can convert a text from English to Spanish almost instantly. Another key application is sentiment analysis, where companies analyze customer reviews to determine if people are happy or unhappy. Finally, NLP powers modern chatbots, which can hold conversations, answer questions, and provide customer support. Thanks to these technologies, our interaction with computers is becoming more natural every day.
